8825.built_by: Annapolis Yacht Yard Inc. (Annapolis, Maryland, U.S.A.)
8825.history: USS SC-521 foundered in heavy weather off Santa Cruz in the Solomon Islands in position 11º03'S, 164º55'E at 0852L/11. She was en-route from Guadalcanal to Pearl Harbour with three other submarine chasers. There was no loss of life as the crew were picked up by USS SC-502 and USS SC-1047 which then returned to Guadalcanal together with USS SC-1327.
commanders: Kendall Endicott Read, USNR (15 Apr 1942 - Mid/late42)
Thomas Handasyde Perkins Whitney, USNR (Mid/late42 - Late 1942)
Lt.(jg) Frank Herman Scrivner, USNR (Late 1942 - 9 Dec 1943)
Frederick W. Freeman, Jr., USNR (9 Dec 1943 - 3 Sep 1944)
S W Crocker, USNR (3 Sep 1944 - Mid 1945)
